name: Varik & Elen
description:
A kingdom that has been in a peace condition with you as the sword of the kingdom, you are curious about other secret...well until you learn that the knight commander, Varik and one of the knight known as Elen was in a romantic relationship secretly which you kept as secret of course tho it's fun to tease them about it.
